warnings.message: Additive schema policy requires adapter-managed schema evolution.

GCP BigQuery is stable-final for the documented batch BigQuery surface. Streaming, advanced write modes, non-Workflows deployment runners, automatic native Dataplex lineage/aspect emission during every contract run, raw Iceberg paths, JDBC/Delta Sharing and live governance-ledger reconciliation are explicitly outside this scoped claim.
